betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Welcome to NuclearCraft: Overhauled§f

§aYou have reached the NuclearCraft tech tree — nuclear power, isotopes, and fission reactors!§f
NuclearCraft: Overhauled (NC) is a massive tech mod that adds the full nuclear lifecycle: mining and processing §borer§f into §bfuel§f, designing §bfission reactors§f, processing §bspent fuel§f, and building §bparticle accelerators§f for isotope separation. The mod integrates tightly with HBM, AE2, and QMD in this modpack.

§6Questline Stages§f:
§b• Stage 1 — Basic Power§f: Build your first §bVoltaic Pile§f, §bNuclear Furnace§f, and §bAlloy Furnace§f. Smelt your first §bTough Alloy Ingot§f and learn to process ores via the §bManufactory§f and §bIngot Former§f.
§b• Stage 2 — Isotopes & Chemistry§f: Set up the §bChemical Reactor§f, §bFluid Mixer§f, and §bFluid Infuser§f. Process §bUranium§f and §bPlutonium§f isotopes. Produce §bLithium-6§f and §bLithium-7§f for advanced recipes.
§b• Stage 3 — Fission Reactors§f: Build a §bSolid Fission Reactor§f, a §bMolten Salt Fission Reactor§f, or a §bModular Scaled Fission Reactor§f. Place §bModerator Blocks§f, §bNeutron Reflectors§f, and §bHeat Sinks§f.
§b• Stage 4 — Advanced Fission & Fusion§f: Build a §bFission Irradiator§f for isotope transmutation, a §bDecay Hastener§f for radioactive decay acceleration, a §bFuel Reprocessor§f for spent fuel processing, and a §bFusion Core§f for D-T / D-He3 fusion.

§6Key Block Families§f:
- §bProcessors§f: Nuclear Furnace, Alloy Furnace, Ingot Former, Pressurizer, Chemical Reactor, Salt Mixer, Fluid Infuser, Crystallizer, Melter, Supercooler, Electrolyzer, Fluid Enricher, Fluid Extractor, Isotope Separator, Centrifuge, Assembler, Manufactory, Rock Crusher, Decay Hastener, Fission Irradiator, Fuel Reprocessor, Infiltrator (multiblock)
- §bReactors§f: Solid Fission Reactor, Molten Salt Fission Reactor, Modular Scaled Fission Reactor (QMD)
- §bPower Storage§f: Voltaic Pile (Basic / Advanced / DU), Lithium Ion Battery
- §bUpgrades§f: Speed Upgrade, Energy Upgrade
- §bParts§f: Basic Plating, Advanced Plating, DU Plating, Elite Plating, Bioplastic, Machine Chassis, Copper Solenoid, Motor, Steel Frame, Empty Cooler (QMD)

§6Why This Quest Is the Gating Item§f:
The task item is `nuclearcraft:part:0` (Basic Plating), a §bfoundational crafting ingredient§f used in nearly every NC machine and tool. To acknowledge NuclearCraft's questline and unlock the §bVoltaic Pile§f, §bNuclear Furnace§f, and subsequent quests, you must first craft one §bBasic Plating§f.

§eTip§f: This quest is a one-off §crecognition milestone§f — once you have a §bBasic Plating§f, the entire NuclearCraft quest chain opens up. Plan to scale up §bTough Alloy§f, §bMagnesium§f, and §bCopper Solenoid§f production before building serious NC machines.
